items.title: Trump heads to Turkey as NATO is strained by Russian attacks, U.S. impatience
items.description: Trump frequently vented about NATO members' refusal to heed U.S. calls for help clearing the Strait of Hormuz during its campaign against Iran.

items.title: Samsung Electronics shares fall as capex, demand concerns cloud record second-quarter profit report
items.description: Samsung Electronics shares fell even after record preliminary Q2 profit as capex and demand concerns clouded the outlook.

items.title: Google backs nuclear fusion startup targeting Europe’s first commercial power plant
items.description: Proxima Fusion has raised $468 million as it looks to move towards commercializing the promising but infamously difficult technical challenge of nuclear fusion.

items.title: Why oil investors fear the next toll fight could be the Strait of Malacca
items.description: The prospect of fees to transit the Strait of Hormuz has sparked alarm, not least by investors who fear it could be replicated in other maritime corridors.

items.title: Hanwha Ocean shares sink 23% as it loses bid to build Canada's next fleet of submarines
items.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney announced Monday that Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems would be the preferred supplier for delivering the submarines.

items.title: Chinese AI models are gaining ground with U.S. companies as OpenAI, Anthropic costs surge
items.description: Recent model releases from Chinese companies including DeepSeek and Z.ai are seen by many as highly competitive compared to leading U.S. frontier systems.

items.title: World Cup in photos: Belgium beats U.S. 4-1 after Balogun controversy, Ronaldo exits
items.description: The U.S. is out of the World Cup, losing 4-1 to Belgium in the Round of 16 in a match blemished by suspension of Folarin Balogun's red card. Ronaldo exits.

items.title: U.S. loses to Belgium 4-1; Balogun plays after Trump calls FIFA
items.description: FIFA reversed Folarin Balogun’s suspension after Trump sought a review, letting the U.S. striker play Belgium over objections.

items.title: Graham Platner denies sex assault claim as Democrats urge him to quit Maine Senate race
items.description: Graham Platner hopes to unseat Republican Sen. Susan Collins, but the Democrat's campaign is reeling from a bombshell allegation by Jenny Racicot.

items.title: Jim Cramer says these are the 5 stocks to buy during this market rotation
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said investors should use the latest market rotation as an opportunity to buy high-quality companies.

items.title: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, as Xbox unit downsizes and plans to spin off four gaming studios
items.description: Microsoft is cutting jobs in its commercial business and its Xbox gaming group, where revenue has been shrinking.

items.title: China's Alibaba bans Anthropic AI for employees after 'distillation attack' accusation
items.description: Chinese e-commerce giant Alibaba has put Anthropic's Claude Code on a high-risk software list.

items.title: SpaceX President Gwynne Shotwell to donate stock to Trump Accounts
items.description: President Donald Trump told CNBC's Joe Kernen last week that he thought SpaceX CEO Elon Musk would donate company stock to the program.

items.title: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas
items.description: Toyota said it is investing $3.6 billion to move production of the Tacoma midsize pickup truck from Mexico to its San Antonio manufacturing campus in Texas.

items.title: Here's our plan for both Honeywell stocks after a divergent first week of trading
items.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

items.title: Here's how SpaceX's Nasdaq-100 inclusion might affect options pricing
items.description: About half-a-million SpaceX options traded by midday Monday, a little below the average since inception.

items.title: NATO tensions are ‘growing pains,’ U.S. ambassador says as Trump presses allies
items.description: U.S. Ambassador to NATO Matthew Whitaker said NATO's allies boosting defense spending under pressure from Trump reflects “growing pains,” not a crisis.

items.title: Student loan servicers begin 90-day countdown for borrowers to leave SAVE plan
items.description: Student loan servicers have begun alerting borrowers that they have 90 days to leave the Biden-era SAVE plan. Here's what comes next.

items.title: Trump defends call urging Balogun red card review: 'It wasn't a foul'
items.description: "I didn't know what the hell a red card was," said Trump, who called FIFA President Gianni Infantino about the suspension of Folarin Balogun.

items.title: Rivian, Tesla and the 'Holly Index': How to trade the new EV Main Street battle
items.description: Mike Khouw gives a trade on Rivian and Tesla, informed by his wife's recent auto purchase.
